headline: Citizens Announces Expanded Role for President Brendan Coughlin
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., July 08, 2026--Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) today announced that Brendan Coughlin, President of Citizens, has assumed oversight of Commercial Banking, adding to a portfolio that already includes the bank’s Consumer Banking, Private Bank, and Wealth businesses as well as several enterprise functions. Ted Swimmer, Head of Commercial Banking and a member of Citizens’ Executive Committee since 2018, will report to Coughlin and continue to lead that business.
